projects.title: Premium Real Estate Campaign
projects.description: Full sales pitch, social media branding, event invitations, hoardings, print & digital ads for a premium real estate client
projects.challenge: Create a visual system that conveys luxury without feeling cold or inaccessible, while maintaining cross-platform consistency.
projects.solution: Used warm photography with bold typography, balancing premium feel with human approachability. Developed a cohesive system that scales from social posts to OOH hoardings.

projects.title: Cygnett Hotels — Multi-Unit Design
projects.description: End-to-end creative output across multiple hotel units — offer creatives, digital ads, menus, stationery, and print materials
projects.challenge: Manage consistent brand identity across a pan-India hospitality brand with multiple properties, each with unique requirements.
projects.solution: Established a flexible design system with core brand guidelines while allowing room for each property's character. Created modular templates for quick turnaround.

projects.title: Sales Pitch Deck
projects.description: Executive-level brand presentations deployed in internal leadership reviews and client-facing pitches
projects.challenge: Translate complex brand strategy into clear, compelling visuals that secure client buy-in and internal alignment.
projects.solution: Structured narratives with clear visual hierarchy. Used data visualization and bold iconography to make abstract concepts tangible.

projects.title: Google & Meta Ad Campaigns
projects.description: Targeted digital advertising campaigns for multiple real estate and hospitality brands across Google and Meta platforms
projects.challenge: Create scroll-stopping creatives that communicate value propositions in seconds while maintaining brand consistency.
projects.solution: Developed A/B tested creative variants with clear value propositions, strong CTAs, and platform-optimized specifications.

projects.title: EDM & Email Campaigns
projects.description: Sales EDMs and event communication assets designed for high-profile real estate campaigns and property launches
projects.challenge: Design emails that cut through crowded inboxes and drive action, while rendering well across email clients and devices.
projects.solution: Created modular email templates with clear hierarchy, strategic use of white space, and compelling CTA placement. Optimized for both desktop and mobile.

projects.title: Social Media Creatives
projects.description: High-performing social media creatives including Reels covers, promotional post series, and video promos
projects.challenge: Produce thumb-stopping content that drives engagement while maintaining brand voice across diverse client industries.
projects.solution: Developed platform-specific content strategies with cohesive visual languages. Created dynamic templates for rapid content production.

projects.title: Event & Wedding Invitations
projects.description: Elegant event invitations and save-the-date designs for real estate and hospitality events
projects.challenge: Create premium-feeling invitations that set the tone for high-end events while communicating essential information clearly.
projects.solution: Balanced sophisticated typography with elegant illustrations. Used premium paper-ready layouts that translate across print and digital formats.

projects.title: F&B Promotion Creatives
projects.description: Appetizing promotion creatives for hotel restaurants and F&B properties
projects.challenge: Make food look irresistible while maintaining brand consistency and driving conversion.
projects.solution: Applied food photography styling principles along with strategic color grading. Created urgency through compelling offers and clear CTAs.

projects.title: Mockup & Product Visualizations
projects.description: Realistic mockups and product visualizations for brand presentations and client pitches
projects.challenge: Create realistic mockups that help clients visualize final deliverables before production.
projects.solution: Developed a library of smart mockup templates with proper lighting, shadows, and perspective. Ensured files are easily customizable.

projects.title: OOH Advertising Campaigns
projects.description: Large-scale hoarding and billboard advertising for property launches and brand campaigns
projects.challenge: Design for massive scale while keeping messages clear and impactful from varying distances and angles.
projects.solution: Applied bold typography hierarchy, simplified compositions, and high-contrast color schemes optimized for outdoor readability.

projects.title: WhatsApp Marketing Campaigns
projects.description: Seasonal promotion campaigns designed for WhatsApp marketing, driving revenue for hotel properties
projects.challenge: Create platform-native content that engages without overwhelming, designed for personal messaging contexts.
projects.solution: Developed conversation-style designs with personal touches. Created segmented campaigns for different audience personas.

projects.title: Logo & Brand Identity Systems
projects.description: Sub-brand visual identity systems including brand manuals and stationery design
projects.challenge: Develop cohesive brand systems that scale across touchpoints while allowing flexibility for sub-brands.
projects.solution: Created comprehensive brand guidelines with clear usage rules, color palettes, and typography systems. Built modular component libraries.
